source: Timberborn v1.0.13.1 running-game /blueprints id list (bridge) + repo docs/kb curated catalog (buildings-catalog.md, buildings-food.md, buildings-water.md, buildings-housing-science.md, production-chains.md, mechanics-numbers.md; cross-referenced to timberborn.wiki.gg) + targeted timberborn.wiki.gg fetches (Aquifer Drill, Geothermal Engine, Centrifuge, Badwater Dome, Earth Recultivator, Shower, Teeth Grindstone). Fields marked _uncertain or listed in _uncertain_fields are unverified against game blueprints.
notes: Covers all building:true blueprint ids from the bridge (157). Non-building blueprint ids (crops, trees, water sources, ruins, relics, natural terrain) are intentionally excluded. Goods vocabulary: log, plank, gear, treated_plank, metal_block, scrap_metal, paper, book, punch_card, pine_resin, maple_syrup, water, badwater, extract, catalyst, biofuel, explosives, dirt, bot_part, bot, science_point, and food goods (carrot/potato/wheat/sunflower/cattail/spadderdock/chestnut/dandelion, flours, bread, crackers, pastries, grilled_*). Power in hamsterpower (hp).

buildings.notes: Colony hub; holds starting goods; employs 4 builders/haulers. Placed free at start. Transmits power. Path efficiency drops (green->red) beyond ~70 path-tiles; no hard cap.
Adds +4 builders; workers reach ~10 tiles off a connected path. Transmits power.
Haulers carry 2x (28 vs 14); frees other workers from hauling. Transmits power. Science cost _uncertain.
Exchanges goods between two districts; place on the shared border. Up to ~10 haulers per side. worker_slots is per-side and _uncertain.
Built instantly, no builder, free. Everything needs path access to operate. Power does NOT flow through paths.
Moves beavers +/-1 level; counts as 1 tile for range; works underwater. Height _uncertain.
Compact vertical climb. Height _uncertain.
Buildable-on deck: most buildings can sit on top (build path on top separately).
2-high platform; stairs fit underneath.
3-high platform.
Cantilever platform supported from a central 1x1. Support geometry _uncertain.
Cantilever platform supported from a central 1x1. Support geometry _uncertain.
Spans a gap; anchor both ends. Nothing can be built on top. Cost and science scale with length; both _uncertain.
Spans a gap; anchor both ends. Nothing can be built on top. Cost and science scale with length; both _uncertain.
Spans a gap; anchor both ends. Nothing can be built on top. Cost and science scale with length; both _uncertain.
Spans a gap; anchor both ends. Nothing can be built on top. Cost and science scale with length; both _uncertain.
Spans a gap; anchor both ends. Nothing can be built on top. Cost and science scale with length; both _uncertain.
Spans a gap; anchor both ends. Nothing can be built on top. Cost and science scale with length; both _uncertain.
Cantilevered walkway/ledge anchored at one end. Cost and science _uncertain.
Cantilevered walkway/ledge anchored at one end. Cost and science _uncertain.
Cantilevered walkway/ledge anchored at one end. Cost and science _uncertain.
Cantilevered walkway/ledge anchored at one end. Cost and science _uncertain.
Cantilevered walkway/ledge anchored at one end. Cost and science _uncertain.
Bores a 1x1 walkway through terrain. Exact cost/extras _uncertain.
Beaver fast-travel (~2.5x); link stations via pylons/beams.
Zipline line support; can stand in water.
Horizontal zipline connector.
3 beds. Folktails breed inside (>=2 adults, no critical need, free bed). Stackable; transmits power.
1 bed; NO breeding (needs a pair). Gap filler. Transmits power.
6 beds; entrance is 1 block UP -> needs path/stairs at +1. Can stand in 1-deep water. Transmits power.
9 beds; densest Folktails housing; entrance +1 up; can stand in 1-deep water. Transmits power.
Free. Picks wild bush/tree food (berries/chestnuts/dandelion) in a ~40x41 area. Day-1 food. Stores gathered food.
Plants+harvests land crops (carrot/potato/wheat/sunflower) on irrigated soil in range; stores ~50 each. Starter tech.
Grows cattail + spadderdock on submerged/shallow-water tiles; place at water edge, workers use stairs.
~30% faster crop growth for <=39 nearby crops (pulses every 2h, 24h per-crop cooldown); small bee-sting risk.
Plants trees/bushes (birch/pine/oak/maple/chestnut/dandelion) in ~21x20 range. Keep 1 Forester per ~4 Lumberjack Flags.
Cooks one recipe at a time. Starter tech (bot workplace variant ~750 sci). Transmits power.
Needs 60 hp power.
Power consumption _uncertain (may transmit only / low draw).
Free. Fells trees marked for cutting (global designation) within ~18-21 tiles; ~1 tree/1.2h. Stores 20 logs. Bootstrap-critical.
Needs 50 hp power. ~0.77 plank/h. Starter tech.
Needs 120 hp power. ~0.33 gear/h.
Needs 80 hp power.
Needs 250 hp power.
Taps mature standing pines (pine resin) and maples (maple syrup) in range; do NOT chop those trees.
Makes books and punch cards (for logic/HTTP). Exact recipe amounts/cycle _uncertain.
Free to build. Collects scrap metal from surface ruins in a ~40x41 range.
Must be placed on an Underground Ruins tile. Prereq: Underground Ruins on map.
Needs 200 hp power.
Food+water -> biofuel (bots); syrup+extract -> catalyst. Transmits power. Recipe amounts/cycle _uncertain.
Extracts 'extract' from badwater. Bot workplace variant unlocks at ~1500 sci.
Turns badwater into explosives. Cost/recipe amounts _uncertain.
Consumable: detonates to destroy 1 terrain block below; chains sideways. Placed like a building then consumed.
Digs 2 blocks deep. Science/cost _uncertain.
Digs 3 blocks deep. Science/cost _uncertain.
Digs dirt from a 5x5 area; needs water access. Recipe/rate _uncertain.
Wonder-tier Awe monument (+10 well-being, 40-tile radius); consumes 500 paper + 500 extract per relaunch. Bot workplace +5000 sci.
Water-facing block must overhang water <=2 deep; 15 internal buffer; ~48 water/day. Unpowered. Bootstrap-critical.
~5x a Water Pump; depth <=4; 60 internal buffer. Unpowered.
Pumps badwater (for Explosives/Centrifuge); depth <=2. Unpowered.
Must sit ON a Badwater Source; seals it; ~40 badwater/h.
Seals a Badwater Source; can be opened/closed at will. Cheaper alternative to Badwater Rig but needs separate Badwater Pumps to extract.
High-volume powered pump (~0.25 m3/s); base doubles as a 3-block levee. Rate _uncertain.
Extracts water from an Aquifer tile (creates a new water source). worker_slots _uncertain (likely 0/unmanned). Output rate _uncertain.
Map-provided/ruined Aquifer Drill variant (repairable). Stats mirror Aquifer Drill; cost/science _uncertain.
Releases stored fluid as flow (irrigation puddles); 15 buffer; stops at ~0.5m below outlet.
Holds 30 water; evaporation-proof & contamination-proof. Starter tech.
Holds 300 water; evaporation/contamination-proof.
Holds 1200 water; evaporation/contamination-proof.
Raises water ~0.65 block then spills over the top. NOT stackable. Cost _uncertain.
100% waterproof wall; STACKABLE to any height; buildable-on. Science _uncertain.
Adjustable gate, threshold 0.00-1.00 in 0.05 steps; adjacent gates sync.
2-wide floodgate (span, not extra height). Cost/science _uncertain.
3-wide floodgate. Cost/science _uncertain.
Auto gate: closes on contamination >5% or by a downstream-depth rule; badtide automation.
One-way fluid valve (lets water pass one direction). Cost/science _uncertain.
Fills to a set level then closes (auto reservoir top-up). Cost/science _uncertain.
Blocks soil-contamination spread; must be on ground.
Waterproof floor tile: blocks water/moisture passing through terrain. Cost/science _uncertain.
Places a solid dirt terrain block (terraforming); consumes dirt. Cost/science _uncertain.
Beaver-powered treadmill; output scales with speed (~35-85 hp, ~50 nominal). Day-1 power. produced_hp is nominal.
No worker. Needs flowing water underneath; output ~270 hp per 1 m3/s of current; STOPS in drought. produced_hp is per-flow nominal.
1x1 base; only 3x3 at heights 2-4. Output 0-150 hp (avg ~68), wind >=30%. Does NOT transmit power. produced_hp is average.
1x1 base. Output 0-300 hp (avg ~144), wind >=20%. produced_hp is average.
Must be placed on a Geothermal Field; generates endless 400 hp continuously, no worker/path needed.
Energy store: 4000 hph flat +2000 hph per empty block below the weight (max ~62000 hph at 29-deep drop). Place on a cliff/platform edge. Not a generator.
Horizontal power link; transmits power. Stack for walls of shafts.
Transmits power. The ONLY way to route power straight up/down.
Power-network switch: engages/disengages a power line (logic-controllable). Cost/science _uncertain.
DEVELOPER/DEBUG building, not available in normal play. Infinite power source used for testing. Not faction-suffixed.
1 science point/h (~16/day). Only start-game science source. Build early.
~13.3 science/h (3.3 per worker); best Folktails science. Power draw _uncertain.
Makes bot heads/chassis/limbs (bot parts). Recipe amounts/cycle _uncertain.
Assembles bots (~36h each). Height and recipe _uncertain.
Open pile: 20 cap of a raw good (logs etc.); ground only. Height _uncertain.
Open pile: 180 cap of raw goods. Height _uncertain.
1000 cap; needs >=2 solid terrain layers below; top stays buildable. Geometry _uncertain.
30 cap, 1 good type; buildable-on.
200 cap; buildable-on.
1200 cap; buildable-on.
Map-provided pile holding recovered goods (not player-built normally). Not faction-suffixed. Footprint _uncertain.
Map-provided water tank holding recovered water. Not faction-suffixed. Footprint _uncertain.
Map-provided warehouse holding recovered goods. Not faction-suffixed. Footprint _uncertain.
Social need, 5 visitors; must be on terrain. Cheapest social; build first.
Social, 8 visitors; MUST be placed on top of another building. Science _uncertain.
Heals the Injury condition; 1 patient; place near housing.
Makes antidotes to cure Contamination. Cost/recipe _uncertain.
Wet-fur need, 1 visitor; pipe must be submerged in pure water; consumes no water.
Fun + wet fur, 7 visitors; must border water (>=0.2 deep).
Fun, 8 visitors; consumes dirt. Cost _uncertain.
Repairs the Chipped Teeth condition; 1 visitor; fits under Double Platforms. Starter tech.
Fun/tranquility wellbeing spot, few visitors. Size/cost/science _uncertain.
Social, 15 visitors. Size/cost/science _uncertain.
Fun, 12 visitors; POWERED attraction; entrance +1 up. Size/cost/power _uncertain.
Best social (+5), 20 visitors. Size/cost _uncertain.
Grooming/beauty wellbeing building (fur detailing). Size/cost/science/need _uncertain.
Aesthetics decoration, range ~3.
Awe, range ~7.
Awe, range ~10.
Wonder-tier Awe; base must be submerged in water. Size _uncertain.
Aesthetics + ~30% nearby crop-growth boost. Boost value _uncertain.
Social, 2 seats; fits under platforms.
Rest/relax decoration seat. Size/cost/science _uncertain.
Aesthetics decor.
Cheap aesthetics decor. Cost/science _uncertain.
Aesthetics light decor. Size/cost/science _uncertain.
Decorative fence. Cost/science _uncertain.
Aesthetics decoration. Size/cost/science _uncertain.
Tall decorative banner (customizable). Size/cost/science _uncertain.
Wall/square decorative banner. Size/cost/science _uncertain.
Decorative/informational pole. Size/cost/science _uncertain.
Decorative roof piece. Cost/science _uncertain.
Decorative roof piece. Cost/science _uncertain.
Decorative roof piece. Cost/science _uncertain.
Decorative roof piece. Cost/science _uncertain.
Decorative roof piece. Cost/science _uncertain.
Logic-triggerable firework display (celebration). Size/cost/science _uncertain.

Manual on/off signal input. Logic-system building (Update 6+ circuits). Emits/consumes a boolean or numeric signal via adjacent logic connections. Stats mostly _uncertain; typically 1x1, cheap (planks/gears/punch cards), moderate science.

Lever whose state is settable via the game's HTTP API (external control). Logic-system building (Update 6+ circuits). Emits/consumes a boolean or numeric signal via adjacent logic connections. Stats mostly _uncertain; typically 1x1, cheap (planks/gears/punch cards), moderate science.

Bridges logic signals to/from the external HTTP API. Logic-system building (Update 6+ circuits). Emits/consumes a boolean or numeric signal via adjacent logic connections. Stats mostly _uncertain; typically 1x1, cheap (planks/gears/punch cards), moderate science.

Configurable boolean gate (AND/OR/NOT/etc.) combining input signals. Logic-system building (Update 6+ circuits). Emits/consumes a boolean or numeric signal via adjacent logic connections. Stats mostly _uncertain; typically 1x1, cheap (planks/gears/punch cards), moderate science.

Repeats/forwards a logic signal to extend a circuit. Logic-system building (Update 6+ circuits). Emits/consumes a boolean or numeric signal via adjacent logic connections. Stats mostly _uncertain; typically 1x1, cheap (planks/gears/punch cards), moderate science.

Latch/flip-flop: stores a boolean state (set/reset). Logic-system building (Update 6+ circuits). Emits/consumes a boolean or numeric signal via adjacent logic connections. Stats mostly _uncertain; typically 1x1, cheap (planks/gears/punch cards), moderate science.

Emits a signal on a configurable time interval. Logic-system building (Update 6+ circuits). Emits/consumes a boolean or numeric signal via adjacent logic connections. Stats mostly _uncertain; typically 1x1, cheap (planks/gears/punch cards), moderate science.

Outputs a signal based on time of day / game clock. Logic-system building (Update 6+ circuits). Emits/consumes a boolean or numeric signal via adjacent logic connections. Stats mostly _uncertain; typically 1x1, cheap (planks/gears/punch cards), moderate science.

Visual lamp that lights per input signal. Logic-system building (Update 6+ circuits). Emits/consumes a boolean or numeric signal via adjacent logic connections. Stats mostly _uncertain; typically 1x1, cheap (planks/gears/punch cards), moderate science.

Plays a sound when its input signal is active. Logic-system building (Update 6+ circuits). Emits/consumes a boolean or numeric signal via adjacent logic connections. Stats mostly _uncertain; typically 1x1, cheap (planks/gears/punch cards), moderate science.

Outputs a signal based on power-network load/availability. Logic-system building (Update 6+ circuits). Emits/consumes a boolean or numeric signal via adjacent logic connections. Stats mostly _uncertain; typically 1x1, cheap (planks/gears/punch cards), moderate science.

Outputs a numeric signal of district population (threshold-configurable). Logic-system building (Update 6+ circuits). Emits/consumes a boolean or numeric signal via adjacent logic connections. Stats mostly _uncertain; typically 1x1, cheap (planks/gears/punch cards), moderate science.

Outputs a signal based on a stored good's quantity vs a threshold. Logic-system building (Update 6+ circuits). Emits/consumes a boolean or numeric signal via adjacent logic connections. Stats mostly _uncertain; typically 1x1, cheap (planks/gears/punch cards), moderate science.

Outputs a signal based on accumulated science points. Logic-system building (Update 6+ circuits). Emits/consumes a boolean or numeric signal via adjacent logic connections. Stats mostly _uncertain; typically 1x1, cheap (planks/gears/punch cards), moderate science.

Outputs signals for weather phase (temperate/drought/badtide) and forecasts. Logic-system building (Update 6+ circuits). Emits/consumes a boolean or numeric signal via adjacent logic connections. Stats mostly _uncertain; typically 1x1, cheap (planks/gears/punch cards), moderate science.

Outputs a signal based on nearby water contamination %. Logic-system building (Update 6+ circuits). Emits/consumes a boolean or numeric signal via adjacent logic connections. Stats mostly _uncertain; typically 1x1, cheap (planks/gears/punch cards), moderate science.

Outputs a signal based on local water depth. Logic-system building (Update 6+ circuits). Emits/consumes a boolean or numeric signal via adjacent logic connections. Stats mostly _uncertain; typically 1x1, cheap (planks/gears/punch cards), moderate science.

Outputs a signal based on local water flow/current. Logic-system building (Update 6+ circuits). Emits/consumes a boolean or numeric signal via adjacent logic connections. Stats mostly _uncertain; typically 1x1, cheap (planks/gears/punch cards), moderate science.

Measures water level/flow at a stream and emits a signal. Logic-system building (Update 6+ circuits). Emits/consumes a boolean or numeric signal via adjacent logic connections. Stats mostly _uncertain; typically 1x1, cheap (planks/gears/punch cards), moderate science.

Triggers placed Dynamite via a logic signal. Logic-system building (Update 6+ circuits). Emits/consumes a boolean or numeric signal via adjacent logic connections. Stats mostly _uncertain; typically 1x1, cheap (planks/gears/punch cards), moderate science.
